tagline: Trusted Pool Service and Repair in Palm Beach

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves Andy's
Personal Touch
hero.subheadline: Owner Andy Brody personally handles every service call — no random techs, no runaround. Palm Beach's highest-rated pool company delivers honest advice, fair pricing, and the kind of care that keeps 243+ families coming back.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block">One Trusted Expert
services.subtitle: From routine weekly cleaning to complex equipment repairs and complete remodels, Andy and his team handle it all — so you never have to juggle multiple contractors.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Comprehensive maintenance including skimming, vacuuming, brushing, chemical balancing, and filter checks. Your pool stays swim-ready every week, guaranteed.

cards.title: Heater Repairs & Installation
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair for all major heater brands — Hayward, Pentair, Raypak, and more. Fast turnaround to keep your water at the perfect temperature.

cards.title: Pump & Filter Service
cards.description: Pool pump repairs, filter deep-cleans, and system upgrades to restore proper circulation and water clarity. Most issues resolved in a single visit.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repair
cards.description: Advanced leak detection technology pinpoints water loss issues fast. Andy identifies the source and gets it fixed — saving you money on water and chemicals.

cards.title: Remodeling & Resurfacing
cards.description: Complete pool renovations with premium finishes like Diamond Brite and Pebble Tec. Transform your tired pool into the backyard centerpiece it should be.

cards.title: Lighting & Automation
cards.description: LED lighting, color-changing systems, and smart pool automation installed by a licensed contractor. Control your pool from your phone.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Andy's White-Glove Pool Care

steps.title: Call or Text Andy Directly
steps.description: No call centers, no runaround. Reach Andy at 561-660-6062 and describe what your pool needs. You'll get an honest assessment and a fair quote within 24 hours.

steps.title: Andy Handles It Personally
steps.description: Every job is performed or directly overseen by Andy himself. Licensed, insured, and backed by 14 years of Palm Beach pool expertise — your pool is in the best hands.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Perfect Pool
steps.description: Relax knowing your pool is clean, safe, and running efficiently. If anything isn't perfect, Andy comes back and makes it right — that's his personal guarantee.

about.label: Why Palm Beach Trusts Andy
about.headline: Not a Franchise — Your Neighbor Who Happens to Be a Pool Expert
about.description: Andy Brody started Palm Beach Pool & Spa Services in 2012 with one truck and a simple promise: treat every pool like it's his own. Fourteen years later, that promise hasn't changed. Andy still personally handles or oversees every service call, giving you the kind of honest advice and meticulous care that big companies simply can't match. That's why 243+ families trust him with their pools — and why his 4.9 Google rating speaks for itself.

features.title: Owner On Every Job
features.description: Andy personally handles or supervises every single service call. You'll never deal with an untrained tech or a stranger in your backyard.

features.title: Fair, Transparent Pricing
features.description: No hidden fees, no surprise charges, no upselling. Andy quotes honestly and sticks to it. If he finds something unexpected, he calls you first.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with any service? Andy comes back and makes it right at no extra charge. Your trust is more important than any single job.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. Zero Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Andy believes in honest quotes and straightforward pricing. No contracts, no cancellation penalties — just great pool care at a fair price.

guarantee.headline: Andy's Personal "Perfect Pool" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service, Andy will come back personally and make it right — no questions asked, no extra charge. He's staked his reputation on delivering exceptional pool care for 14 years, and he's not about to stop now. Your satisfaction isn't just a policy; it's Andy's word.

faqs.question: How quickly can Andy start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within a few days. For urgent repairs or green pool emergencies, Andy often responds the same day or next day. Just call 561-660-6062 and he'll work with your timeline.

faqs.question: Does Andy personally do the work?
faqs.answer: Yes. Andy personally handles or directly oversees every single service call. You'll never get a random technician — just a licensed, insured pool expert who knows your pool and your preferences.

faqs.question: What brands of equipment do you service?
faqs.answer: Andy services all major brands including Hayward, Jandy, Pentair, Zodiac, and Raypak. Whether it's a pump, heater, filter, or salt system, he has the expertise and parts access to get it fixed right.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a contract?
faqs.answer: Never. Andy doesn't believe in locking you in. You can adjust, pause, or cancel service anytime with zero fees. He earns your business every visit — that's the way it should be.

faqs.question: What areas in Palm Beach do you serve?
faqs.answer: Andy serves Palm Beach Gardens, Jupiter, North Palm Beach, West Palm Beach, Royal Palm Beach, Wellington, Palm Beach, Juno Beach, Loxahatchee, and Riviera Beach. If you're in the greater Palm Beach area, give him a call.

testimonials.name: Sunday B.
testimonials.text: My pool developed a yellow film. I called Andy and he came the next day! We made a plan to start from scratch and it worked perfectly. He is the best and me and my pool are happy again!

testimonials.name: Margaret M.
testimonials.text: He treats us like family. I am often out of town and can rest easy knowing my pool and hot tub are taken care of with no issue.

testimonials.name: Jeffrey M.
testimonials.text: Excellent experience. I had multiple parts of my pool equipment replaced this week including my heater and filter housing. Professional and thorough.
